title: calla palustris
intro: Calla palustris, also known as the bog arum or marsh calla, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the arum family (Araceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Calla palustris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and even help with wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
